title: pyrenacantha grandiflora
intro: Pyrenacantha grandiflora, also known as the African Pyrenacantha, is a species of flowering plant in the family Icacinaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Pyrenacantha grandiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
